description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust metal slide and a polymer grip. The grip is ergonomically contoured with visible panel screws and subtle texturing for improved handling. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement and control. The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, unadorned exterior and a prominent muzzle opening. The slide has minimal external markings, maintaining a clean and utilitarian appearance. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, lacking any extended or flared features.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a contoured grip, rounded trigger guard, and a clean, unmarked slide.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the rear, showing the narrow profile of the slide and grip, with the rear sight and backstrap visible.
description_view_1: A full left-side view reveals the ergonomic grip, trigger, rounded trigger guard, and the smooth slide with minimal markings.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the circular muzzle opening, the width of the slide, and the front sight post.
description_view_3: A full right-side view displays the grip panels, trigger, and the slide, mirroring the left side with similar features.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a gentle palm swell and subtle finger grooves, providing a comfortable and secure hold. It features a matte, slightly textured polymer surface with visible panel screws for attachment. The sides of the grip are flat with a slight taper toward the base, and there are no visible logos or embellishments. The backstrap is smoothly curved, enhancing ergonomic fit, while the front strap is straight and unadorned.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth, continuous curve and no undercuts or squared-off edges. It is of standard size, providing ample space for finger placement, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is utilitarian, with no integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length with a smooth, cylindrical profile and a prominent, circular muzzle opening. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or fluting are present on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide appears to have minimal or no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions. There are no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations apparent on either side of the slide. The surface is clean and unadorned, contributing to a utilitarian look.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extension, bevel, or flare. It is simple in design, lacking finger rests, logos, or texturing, and maintains a seamless transition with the grip's contour.
